name: video-prep
description: Tools to clean up raw clips before editing: cut silence, subtitles in any language (Mandarin default), normalize speed, stitch in order.

plugins.name: video-prep
plugins.description: Clean up raw video clips before editing — cut silence, subtitles in any language (Mandarin default), normalize speed, stitch in order — with a /prep-clips skill plus filler-word removal and subtitle burning.
